prompt: hello, explain what is 2+2 step by step
notes: IMPORTANT: Capture the /api/chat SSE stream response (NOT the message.newChat tRPC response). Mistral uses TWO endpoints: (1) POST /api/trpc/message.newChat for metadata, (2) POST /api/chat for the actual AI text stream via SSE. We need the SSE format from /api/chat. Open DevTools Network tab BEFORE sending. After the AI responds, find the /api/chat request that has type 'eventsource' or 'fetch' with content-type text/event-stream. Capture: (1) request URL and method, (2) request body (the JSON payload), (3) response Content-Type header, (4) first 500 chars of the SSE response body showing the event format (data: lines, event names, etc.). This is critical for building a warning that appears in the chat UI.
